item.description:
• New: in-app "Relaunch to update" pill — updates download silently and apply with one click.
  • New: drag an image from Finder onto the canvas to use it as the starting image.
  • Generation Area now fits any opened image exactly.
  • Failed model/LoRA downloads and deletes now show clear error messages.
  • Busy engine no longer fails a generation — it waits its turn automatically.
  • New: Cancel button stops any local generation mid-run (including FLUX/Z-Image).
